_comment: Base creatures for the FUSED resonance-evolution system (Build Pass 2). Each base has exactly TWO evolution branches (see evolutionForms.json) — which one it takes is steered by the player: working next to a decor that channels branch A fills branch-A affinity, branch B decor fills branch B. `affinityThreshold` is how much affinity evolves a creature under NORMAL play (onboarding uses the much lower override in onboarding.json). Placeholder shapes/colors — swap for real art later. `speed` is walk speed in px/sec, `wanderRadius` is idle roaming range in tiles.

cindling.name: Cindling
cindling.flavor: A warm little ember-spirit. What it becomes is up to you.

sporeling.name: Sporeling
sporeling.flavor: A soft-capped forest sprout, listening for the right soil.

nimbling.name: Nimbling
nimbling.flavor: A restless wisp of sky, waiting for a storm or a breeze.
